ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "BAD_REQUEST", message: error.description default (error.message default "bad request") }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "NOT_FOUND", message: error.description default "resource not found" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED", message: error.description default "method not allowed" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { jsonrpc: "2.0", id: vars.rpcId, result: payload }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED", message: "server-initiated stream not supported" }

ee:transform.doc:name: build POST body from tool input

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { riskScore: (vars.toolInput.riskScore default 0) as Number, reason: (vars.toolInput.reason default "") as String, incidentId: (vars.toolInput.incidentId default "") as String }

ee:transform.doc:name: build POST body from tool input

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var ti = (vars.toolInput default {}) --- ((if (ti.region != null and (ti.region as String) != "") {region: (ti.region as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.status != null and (ti.status as String) != "") {status: (ti.status as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.riskScoreMin != null) {riskScoreMin: (ti.riskScoreMin as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.riskScoreMax != null) {riskScoreMax: (ti.riskScoreMax as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.limit != null) {limit: (ti.limit as String)} else {}))

%dw 2.0 output application/java var ti = (vars.toolInput default {}) --- ((if (ti.supplierGoldenId != null and (ti.supplierGoldenId as String) != "") {supplierGoldenId: (ti.supplierGoldenId as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.category != null and (ti.category as String) != "") {category: (ti.category as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.location != null and (ti.location as String) != "") {location: (ti.location as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.nameLike != null and (ti.nameLike as String) != "") {nameLike: (ti.nameLike as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.limit != null) {limit: (ti.limit as String)} else {}))

%dw 2.0 output application/java var ti = (vars.toolInput default {}) --- ((if (ti.supplierGoldenId != null and (ti.supplierGoldenId as String) != "") {supplierGoldenId: (ti.supplierGoldenId as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.partNumber != null and (ti.partNumber as String) != "") {partNumber: (ti.partNumber as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.status != null and (ti.status as String) != "") {status: (ti.status as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.severity != null and (ti.severity as String) != "") {severity: (ti.severity as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.since != null and (ti.since as String) != "") {since: (ti.since as String)} else {}) ++ (if (ti.limit != null) {limit: (ti.limit as String)} else {}))

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var status = attributes.statusCode default 0 --- { status: (if (status >= 200 and status < 300) "success" else "error"), tool: vars.toolName, result: (payload default {}) }
